title: Modes, Padding, Malleability, and Legacy Decryption · Go Semantics Case: Crypto Go Legacy Decrypt Only
summary: A database encrypts records with ECB, a migration endpoint exposes CBC padding failures, and a CTR counter can repeat after restoring a snapshot. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the legacy decrypt only increment in mode failure laboratory and migration adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Build a bounded decrypt-only adapter that authenticates format, suppresses oracles, records migration, and never emits new legacy ciphertext.
For unavoidable legacy modes, authenticate versioned context and ciphertext before decryption with independent keys and uniform failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Legacy Decrypt Only · Theory Crypto Go Legacy Decrypt Only
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 6323 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ECB and unauthenticated modes while containing CBC or CTR to uniform decrypt-only migration; reject toy, obsolete, unauthenticated, self-signed-trust, downgrade, and security-by-obscurity shortcuts; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Build a bounded decrypt-only adapter that authenticates format, suppresses oracles, records migration, and never emits new legacy ciphertext.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Legacy Decrypt Only contract for the supplied data.
